exploration_notes: Trait method resolution in rustc lives in `compiler/rustc_hir_typeck/src/method/`. Three files are central: (1) **probe.rs** contains `ProbeContext` which assembles candidate trait method implementations via `assemble_inherent_candidates`, `assemble_extension_candidates_for_traits_in_scope`, and related helpers, then selects among them in `pick`/`pick_method`/`pick_core`.
